name: nomnoml
when_to_use: 需要用极简 DSL 画 UML/框线关系图且在意体积时用它,而非手写 canvas/SVG——原生手写在自动布局、连线避让和文本量尺上会失败。非做自由画布、实时协作或复杂 BPMN。
why_valuable: AI 默认虽会写框线文本,却做不好稳定的 UML 节点布局与连线几何;nomnoml 让 AI 只写低歧义 DSL,由 graphre 确定性排版到 canvas。

en.when_to_use: Use it instead of hand-writing canvas/SVG when you need a tiny DSL for UML or box-and-line relationship diagrams and care about bundle size, because native implementations fail at automatic layout, edge routing, and text measurement. Not for a free-form canvas, real-time collaboration, or complex BPMN.
en.why_valuable: AI can normally write box-and-line text but cannot produce stable UML node layout and edge geometry; nomnoml lets AI write only a low-ambiguity DSL, which graphre deterministically lays out onto canvas.

schema.source: string -- nomnoml DSL; nodes use [Name], relationships such as [A]->[B], and directive lines begin with #

spec.note: The canvas wrapper defaults to an explicit 400px height with scrolling; do not use vh or percentage heights (rule 3). nomnoml writes the canvas pixel width and height from the DSL layout; do not stretch and distort it in CSS.

data_in._why_no_minimal: nomnoml DSL 是短文本原生记法,schema 足矣;不为浅配置附 minimal。

schema.source: string —— nomnoml DSL;节点用 [Name],关系如 [A]->[B],指令行以 # 开头
schema.scale?: number > 0 —— canvas 渲染倍率,默认 1

spec.note: canvas 外层默认显式高 400px并滚动,禁 vh/百分比高(铁律 3);canvas 像素宽高由 nomnoml 按 DSL 布局写入,不要在 CSS 中拉伸变形。

carriers.widget: supported:canvas 与 graphre 纯 JS 均落 shadow 容器,无 CSS/worker/wasm/uplink

isolation.evidence: +esm scan: 0 `document.head`, 0 `document.body`, 0 document/window addEventListener. Uses measureText/getContext (9 refs) for text sizing and draws into the caller-supplied canvas (only dependency is graphre, bundled). No global injection or portals — canvas output fully within the passed shadow container.
